checkout.tip_info_body:
It's up to you to tip, but it can be a nice way to thank your couriers for their service.

All tips – without taxes and social security contributions – go directly to our couriers. If a restaurant employs couriers, we advise them to pay out tips directly, minus all taxes and social security deductions.

By rounding up your order total, you support charitable projects by Dr. Sahin e.V. – medical aid, education, and social participation for those in need.

Every cent counts and reaches those who need it most, without any deductions.

checkout.privacy_policy_content:
Privacy Policy for Customers

This privacy policy describes how LOKMA GmbH (hereinafter "LOKMA", "we" or "us") collects, uses, discloses and otherwise processes personal data. It applies to the processing of personal data of customers who use our platforms and products — including this app, our website lokma.shop, and other available services — to place orders at one of our partner businesses (restaurants, butcher shops, grocery stores and other merchants).

1. Data Controller

LOKMA GmbH
Schulte-Braucks-Str. 1
41836 Hückelhoven
Germany
Email: datenschutz@lokma.shop
Phone: +49 178 4443475
VAT ID: DE361623128

2. Data We Collect

We collect the following categories of personal data:
• Contact data: Name, email address, phone number, delivery address
• Account information: Login credentials, profile picture, preferred language
• Order data: Order history, cart contents, payment information
• Location data: Delivery address, approximate location to display nearby stores
• Device data: Device ID, operating system, app version, push token
• Usage data: App interactions, search queries, pages visited

3. Purpose of Data Processing

We use your data for the following purposes:
• Processing and fulfilling your orders
• Providing and improving our services
• Communicating with you (order status, support inquiries)
• Billing and payment processing via our payment provider Stripe
• Sending relevant offers and information (only with your consent)
• Fraud prevention and security measures
• Compliance with legal obligations

4. Legal Basis

The processing of your personal data is based on:
• Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — Contract performance
• Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR — Your consent
• Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — Legitimate interests
• Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR — Legal obligations

5. Sharing with Third Parties

We share your data with:
• Partner businesses — to process your order
• Couriers — to deliver your order
• Payment providers (Stripe) — for payment processing
• Cloud services (Google Firebase) — for hosting and data storage
• Authorities — when legally required

6. Data Retention and Deletion

We store your personal data only as long as necessary for the respective processing purposes or as required by statutory retention periods. You may request the deletion of your account and data at any time by emailing datenschutz@lokma.shop.

7. Your Rights

Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
• Right to access your stored data
• Right to rectification of inaccurate data
• Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
• Right to restriction of processing
• Right to data portability
• Right to object to certain processing
• Right to withdraw consent

To exercise your rights, contact us at datenschutz@lokma.shop.

8. Cookies and Tracking

Our app does not use browser cookies. For analytical purposes, we use Firebase Analytics, which collects anonymized usage data. Push notifications are sent only with your consent via Firebase Cloud Messaging.

9. Data Security

We employ appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, loss or misuse. Data transmission is encrypted via TLS/SSL.

10. Right to Complain

You have the right to file a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.

11. Changes

We reserve the right to update this privacy policy as needed to reflect current legal requirements or changes to our services.

As of: March 2026
LOKMA GmbH | lokma.shop
checkout.terms_content:
General Terms of Service for Customers

These terms of service govern the business relationship between LOKMA GmbH (hereinafter "LOKMA") and its customers. They do not apply to partner businesses (restaurants, butcher shops and other merchants), for which separate terms and conditions apply.

1. Definitions

Offer: The products and services offered by the partner business that can be ordered by customers through the platform.
Order: The ordering of an offer from a partner business through the platform.
Customer: A natural person (at least 18 years old) or a legal entity placing orders through the platform.
Platform: The app (LOKMA), the website (lokma.shop), and associated tools and services.
Partner Business: A restaurant, butcher shop, grocery store, or other merchant offering products through the LOKMA platform.

2. Subject Matter

LOKMA operates a digital platform through which customers can order products from partner businesses. LOKMA acts as an intermediary between customers and partner businesses. The purchase contract for the ordered products is concluded directly between the customer and the partner business.

3. Registration and Account

• Using the platform may require registration.
• Customers are obligated to provide truthful and complete information.
• Login credentials must be kept confidential.
• LOKMA reserves the right to suspend accounts in case of violation of these terms.

4. Ordering Process

• Customers select products from a partner business's offer.
• The order is forwarded to the partner business after confirmation.
• The partner business decides on acceptance or rejection of the order.
• Customers are informed about the order status in real time.

5. Prices and Payment

• Prices displayed on the platform are set by the partner business.
• All prices include the applicable statutory VAT.
• Additional delivery fees, service fees or tips may apply.
• Available payment methods: Cash, card payment (via Stripe), card on delivery.
• Card payments are processed through our payment provider Stripe.

6. Delivery

• Delivery is made to the address provided by the customer.
• Delivery times are estimates and may vary.
• Customers must ensure they are reachable at the time of delivery.
• In case of absence, the delivery instructions stored in the app apply.

7. Cancellation

• Orders can be cancelled as long as the partner business has not accepted the order.
• After acceptance by the partner business, cancellation is only possible in exceptional cases.
• In case of justified cancellations, the paid amount will be refunded.

8. Vouchers and Credits

• Vouchers and LOKMA wallet credits are subject to their respective terms.
• Vouchers cannot be redeemed for cash unless otherwise stated.
• LOKMA reserves the right to revoke vouchers in case of misuse.

9. Liability

• LOKMA is not liable for the quality, freshness or condition of products provided by partner businesses.
• Complaints regarding products should be directed to the partner business or through LOKMA support.
• LOKMA is only liable for grossly negligent or intentional breaches of duty.

10. Data Protection

Personal data is processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and the GDPR. For more information, see our Privacy Policy.

11. Changes to Terms

LOKMA may amend these terms at any time. Customers will be notified of significant changes in advance. Continued use of the platform after notification of changes constitutes acceptance.

12. Applicable Law

The laws of the Federal Republic of Germany apply. For consumers, the mandatory consumer protection laws of the country of residence apply.

13. Contact

LOKMA GmbH
Schulte-Braucks-Str. 1
41836 Hückelhoven
Germany
Email: kontakt@lokma.shop
Phone: +49 178 4443475

As of: March 2026
LOKMA GmbH | lokma.shop

marketplace.tuna_description_1: Our journey began in 1987 in a tiny shop on Eigelstein in Cologne. From the very beginning, all members of our family business were motivated by the conviction: 'Halal, hygienic and high-quality food should be sold wherever Muslims live.'
marketplace.tuna_description_2: Today, more than a quarter of a century later, our small production and sales business has developed into a far-reaching success story.
marketplace.brand_disclaimer: This safety certificate and logo are issued directly by {brandName} to the businesses and are regularly audited by them. As soon as a business stops selling {brandName} products, this logo will be immediately removed from the business's profile on the LOKMA platform. In short, this safety standard is not issued by LOKMA; full control and responsibility lie exclusively with {brandName}.

profile.faq_delivery_time_answer: Delivery time varies depending on the business and your location. Typically, your order is delivered within 30-60 minutes.
profile.faq_how_to_order_answer: Select a category from the home page (Butcher, Market, Restaurant, etc.), choose the business you want, add products to your cart and proceed to checkout.
profile.faq_minimum_order: Is There a Minimum Order Amount?
profile.faq_minimum_order_answer: Minimum order amount may vary from business to business. You can see this information on each business's detail page.
profile.faq_payment_answer: You can pay by cash at the door or by card. You can change your payment preferences under Profile > Payment Methods.
profile.faq_what_is_lokma_answer: LOKMA is a platform where you can order online from local butchers, restaurants and markets. We deliver fresh meat, home-cooked meals and market products to your door.

welcome.title: LOKMA'ya Hoşgeldiniz
welcome.subtitle: LOKMA'yı kullanarak, Genel Şartlar ve Koşullarımızı kabul etmiş olursunuz. Verilerinizi nasıl işlediğimizi Gizlilik Politikamızdan öğrenebilirsiniz.

cookies.title: Çerez Ayarları
cookies.subtitle: Sana en iyi deneyimi sunmak, uygulamayı geliştirmek ve içerikleri kişiselleştirmek için çerez (cookie) ve benzeri teknolojiler kullanıyoruz.

notifications.title: Bildirimlere İzin Ver
notifications.subtitle: Siparişinizin durumu hakkındaki güncellemeler, size özel fırsatlar, bildirimleri istediğiniz zaman uygulama ayarlarından yönetme imkanı.

location.title: Tam olarak neredesin?
location.subtitle: Bölgende teslimat yapan partnerleri bulmamız için, sana teslimat sürelerini ve teslimat ücretlerini daha net gösterebilmemiz için, güncel adresini sipariş adımında doğrulamak için.
